purpose: Paper-level figure quality surfaces for Display Pack v2: figure intent, declarative medical figure specs, style references, visual audit receipts, AI/VLM polish lifecycle, and AI illustration receipts.
machine_boundary: The enforceable validators live in med_autoscience.publication_figure_quality_contract. This JSON file indexes the stable surface names, paths, consumers, and authority boundaries for other agents and contract readers.

figure_intent.authority_boundary: Binds each paper display to a claim ref, data ref, template id, and display kind; it does not authorize publication readiness or mutate artifacts.

medical_figure_spec.relationship: Binds figure_intent, Display Template, figure kind, medical semantics, and optional panel roles.
medical_figure_spec.authority_boundary: Declarative medical figure grammar only; it is not a renderer, Vega-Lite runtime, publication verdict, or data/statistics mutation surface.

medical_figure_specs.relationship: Optional multi-figure batch surface. Each figures[] entry binds figure_intent, Display Template, figure kind, medical semantics, and optional panel roles using the same authority boundary as paper/figure_spec.json.
medical_figure_specs.authority_boundary: Declarative batch grammar only; it enables one E2E lifecycle to materialize multiple figures without becoming a renderer, Vega-Lite runtime, publication verdict, or data/statistics mutation surface.

figure_style_reference_bundle.authority_boundary: Stores link-only style preferences and reference choices. It is style input only and cannot import external figures, scripts, screenshots, or runtime authority.

figure_visual_audit_receipt.authority_boundary: Records review of real rendered artifacts and routes concrete findings. It is quality evidence, not a publication verdict or artifact authority.

figure_polish_lifecycle.relationship: Binds AI/VLM polish events to figure_visual_audit_receipt and display_pack_lock.publication_figure_quality_refs.
figure_polish_lifecycle.authority_boundary: Quality lifecycle evidence only; events cannot mutate data/statistics/evidence marks or carry publication verdicts.

ai_illustration_receipt.hard_boundary: scientific_claim_carried must be false for every AI-generated illustration candidate.
ai_illustration_receipt.authority_boundary: AI-generated illustration candidates may support illustration_shell quality only. They cannot carry evidence marks, modify data/statistics, or become a second publication owner.

display_pack_lock.behavior: When a paper root is provided, the lock records each surface path, present/missing status, and sha256 for present valid files.

submission_manifest.behavior: Submission packaging preserves the refs already recorded in display_pack_lock.json.
